$description: Semantic design tokens -- purpose-mapped, referencing primitives. Every token has $description and $extensions with pairing rules, do/don't guidance, and accessibility metadata.

primary.$description: The brand's primary identity color. Used for primary buttons, links, and key brand elements.

$extensions.pairing: Use with white text or neutral-50 backgrounds
$extensions.do: Use for primary CTAs, navigation active states, brand header bars
$extensions.dont: Do not use for large background areas (too dark). Use primary-50 to primary-200 for backgrounds.
$extensions.a11y: WCAG AA: white text on this color passes at 10.2:1

secondary.$description: Action/accent color for CTAs, highlights, and interactive elements.

$extensions.pairing: Use with primary-700 text (not white -- fails WCAG). Or use secondary-600/700 for white text.
$extensions.do: Use for secondary buttons, success indicators, growth metrics, accent borders
$extensions.dont: Do not use as button background with white text (fails WCAG at 2.8:1). Use secondary-600 instead.
$extensions.a11y: WCAG AA: white text FAILS. Use primary-700 text or darken to secondary-600 for white text.

accent.$description: Domain-specific accent color. DE: warm amber for heat-recovery contexts.

$extensions.do: Use for domain-specific callouts, specialized data viz, context indicators
$extensions.dont: Do not overuse -- accent should appear in max 10% of visual area

subtle.$description: Subtle surface for cards, alternating table rows, secondary containers.

strong.$description: Strong surface for active states, selected items.

inverse.$description: Dark surface for hero sections, key reveals, dark slides.

$extensions.do: Use for cover pages, hero sections, dramatic reveal slides, video backgrounds
$extensions.dont: Do not use for more than 30% of a document. Reserve for high-impact moments.

brand.$description: Brand-colored surface. Used for branded sections, banners.

inverse-subtle.$description: Subtle surface on dark/inverse backgrounds. Cards on dark sections.

$extensions.pairing: Use with text.inverse and text.inverse-secondary tokens

text-inverse.$description: Text colors for use on dark/inverse surfaces only.

primary.$description: Primary body text on light surfaces.

secondary.$description: Secondary text, captions, metadata on light surfaces.

heading.$description: Heading text. Uses brand primary family for brand reinforcement.

$extensions.do: Underline on hover for additional affordance

caption.$description: Source citations, footnotes, timestamps. Smallest text elements.

$extensions.a11y: Contrast on neutral-50: 3.1:1 (passes AA for large text only, use ≥12px at this contrast ratio per WCAG 2.1 AA)

default.$description: Default borders for cards, tables, inputs.

brand.$description: Brand-colored borders for accent elements, active tabs.

focus.$description: Focus state tokens for keyboard navigation.

ring.$description: Focus ring color. Apply as outline or box-shadow with 30% opacity.

$extensions.implementation: box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba({this}, 0.3) or outline: 2px solid {this} with 2px offset
$extensions.a11y: Focus indicator must be visible on both light and dark backgrounds. Minimum 3:1 contrast against adjacent colors.

feedback.$description: Semantic feedback colors. 4 states x foreground + background = 8 tokens.

fg.$description: Warning text and icons. Uses accent hue.

data.$description: Data visualization colors. 9 tokens: 6 series + positive + negative + neutral.

positive.$description: Positive values in charts (growth, profit, above target).

negative.$description: Negative values in charts (loss, decline, below target).

audience.$description: Audience-specific accent colors. Dynamic count from brand-config audience_segments. DE default: 6 segments.

$extensions.usage: Badge backgrounds, chart series overrides, section accent borders, callout left borders when content targets this audience

district-heat.$description: District heating audience accent. Warm orange.

$extensions.usage: Badge backgrounds, chart series overrides, section accent borders, callout left borders when content targets this audience

industrial-heat.$description: Industrial heat buyer accent. Deep amber.

$extensions.usage: Badge backgrounds, chart series overrides, section accent borders, callout left borders when content targets this audience
Badge backgrounds, chart series overrides, section accent borders, callout left borders when content targets this audience
Badge backgrounds, chart series overrides, section accent borders, callout left borders when content targets this audience
Badge backgrounds, chart series overrides, section accent borders, callout left borders when content targets this audience

color-mode.$description: Light/dark mode token mappings. The default tokens above are light-mode. This section provides dark-mode inversions. Apply by swapping CSS custom properties based on prefers-color-scheme or a user toggle.

dark.$description: Dark mode overrides. Apply these when color scheme is 'dark'.

$extensions.implementation: In CSS: use @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) to swap --color-surface-default etc. In HTML design system: toggle body class 'dark' to swap CSS custom properties.
$extensions.brand-colors: Brand primary, secondary, accent, and feedback colors remain unchanged in dark mode. Only surface, text, and border tokens invert.

typography.$description: Typography composites. 15 tokens combining font family, size, weight, line-height, and letter-spacing.

display.$description: Display/hero text. Impact numbers, hero statements. Largest text in the system.

hero.$description: Hero text. Section openers, key metric callouts.

h4.$description: H4 heading. Component titles, card headers.

body-lg.$description: Large body text. Lead paragraphs, introductions.

body.$description: Standard body text. Paragraphs, lists, descriptions.

body-sm.$description: Small body text. Secondary information, metadata.

caption.$description: Caption text. Source citations, footnotes, timestamps.

overline.$description: Overline text. Category labels, section indicators. ALL CAPS.

data.$description: Data text. Table cells, technical values, metrics in body context.

data-lg.$description: Large data text. Metric cards, key numbers, KPI displays.

label.$description: Form labels, tag text, badge text.

sm.$description: Tight content gap. Between label and input, icon and text.

md.$description: Standard content gap. Between paragraphs, list items.

lg.$description: Large content gap. Between content groups.

xl.$description: Section gap. Between major content sections.

margin.$description: Page/slide outer margin. Content safe zone.

section-gap.$description: Gap between major sections on a page/slide.

lg.$description: Generous padding. Large cards, hero containers.

pattern.$description: Background pattern tokens. Default: subtle geometric based on DE personality (minimal_expressive=4). Status: default-pending-confirmation via Q7.6.

style.$description: Pattern style. Options: none | subtle-geometric | brand-pattern | gradient.

opacity.$description: Pattern overlay opacity. Low for minimal personality.

color.$description: Pattern stroke/fill color. Light primary tint for subtle effect.

scale.$description: Pattern repeat unit size in px.

type.$description: Geometric pattern type. Options: dot-grid | line-grid | isometric | hex. Dot-grid is cleanest for data-forward personality.

gradient.$description: Color gradient tokens for background treatments. Status: default-pending-confirmation via Q7.6.

brand.$description: Primary brand gradient. Navy to dark navy. Hero sections, cover slides.

surface.$description: Subtle surface gradient. Adds depth to large background areas.

accent.$description: Accent gradient for CTA highlights and callouts.

data-overlay.$description: Dark overlay gradient for text on images. Bottom-heavy fade.
